message:
test(raptorq,io): repair equation projection, fused SIMD benches, replay context

RaptorQ tests:
- src/raptorq/tests.rs: add repair_symbol_matches_rfc_equation_projection
  verifying each repair symbol equals the dot product of its RFC 6330
  repair equation columns with intermediate symbols — closes the
  encode-decode round-trip proof gap for ESIs beyond source block range

RaptorQ benchmarks:
- benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs: add gf256_mul_slices2 and
  gf256_addmul_slices2 fused dual-lane benchmarks alongside sequential
  baselines, enabling direct measurement of ILP gains from the fused
  SIMD paths; includes bit-exactness validation for both fused variants

Perf invariant tests:
- tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs: add replay_log_context() helper
  emitting structured replay_ref/scenario_id/fixture_ref fields in
  seed sweep logging; define REPLAY_CATALOG_ARTIFACT_PATH and
  REPLAY_FIXTURE_REF constants for cross-artifact linkage

Golden probe:
- tests/golden_probe.rs: remove unused Gf256 and DetRng imports

IO cancellation:
- tests/io_cancellation.rs: unwrap TcpStream::from_std result with
  .expect("wrap stream") instead of silently discarding errors (2 sites)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
